phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar onde fica a caixa registadora principal?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh preen-see-PAHL?

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the lady at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the lady at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional products shelf is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a prateleira dos produtos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pruh-tih-LAY-ruh DOOSH proo-DOO-toosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Produtos típicos são expostos em prateleiras laterais para não obstruir o fluxo.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the lady at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the lady at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional products shelf is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a seção de produtos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH sih-SOWN DIH proo-DOO-toosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional products are often displayed near the pastry counter for visibility.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the lady at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the lady at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Chá da Terra Azoriano is
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o Chá da Terra Azoriano?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW SHAH DUH TEH-ruh uh-zoo-REEAHN-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: Chás regionais são mantidos em vitrines refrigeradas para preservar o aroma.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main cash register is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa registadora principal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh preen-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pastelarias, the main cash register is typically at the counter where orders are placed.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a caixa registadora fica no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the cash register is at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, the cash register is at the counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, a caixa registadora fica no balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the order pickup counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de entrega de pedidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-REH-guh DIH peh-DEE-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: O espaço é compacto, por isso o balcão de entrega fica próximo à preparação.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se à senhora do balcão que indica o local.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH seh-NYOH-ruh DOO bahl-KOWN KIH een-DEE-kuh AW loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the lady at the counter who will show you where.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the lady at the counter who will show you where.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH seh-NYOH-ruh DOO bahl-KOWN KIH een-DEE-kuh AW loo-KAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, dirija-se à senhora do balcão que indica o local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to order Queijadas da Vila Franca
phrases.text_local: Onde posso pedir as Queijadas da Vila Franca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-DEER UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DUH VEE-luh FRAHNNG-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Pastelarias açorianas centralizam os pedidos na caixa para agilizar o serviço.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na caixa registadora principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main cash register.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main cash register.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, na caixa registadora principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional products shelf is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a prateleira de produtos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH pruh-tih-LAY-ruh DIH proo-DOO-toosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional products like Bolo Lêvedo and Queijadas are often displayed near the counter or cake area.

likely_response.local: Na zona dos bolos, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ZOH-nuh DOOSH BOH-loosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the cake area, on the right.

responses.english: In the cake area, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH ZOH-nuh DOOSH BOH-loosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Na zona dos bolos, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional products shelf is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a prateleira de produtos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH pruh-tih-LAY-ruh DIH proo-DOO-toosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional products like Bolo Lêvedo and Queijadas are often displayed near the counter or cake area.

likely_response.local: Na zona dos bolos, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ZOH-nuh DOOSH BOH-loosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the cake area, on the right.

responses.english: In the cake area, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH ZOH-nuh DOOSH BOH-loosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Na zona dos bolos, à direita.
